creator: jas@corpus-callosum.com
text:
Attempting to install the devel/p5-Term-ReadKey port required by other ports fails to complete:


# pwd
/usr/ports/devel/p5-Term-ReadKey
# make distclean
===>  Cleaning for p5-Term-ReadKey-2.31
===>  Deleting distfiles for p5-Term-ReadKey-2.31
# make
===>   p5-Term-ReadKey-2.31 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> TermReadKey-2.31.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.cpan.org/pub/CPAN/modules/by-module/Term/TermReadKey-2.31.tar.gz
TermReadKey-2.31.tar.gz                       100% of   77 kB  174 kBps 00m00s
===> Fetching all distfiles required by p5-Term-ReadKey-2.31 for building
===>  Extracting for p5-Term-ReadKey-2.31
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for TermReadKey-2.31.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for p5-Term-ReadKey-2.31
===>   p5-Term-ReadKey-2.31 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.16.3 - found
===>  Configuring for p5-Term-ReadKey-2.31
Checking if your kit is complete...
Looks good
Generating a GNU-style Makefile
Writing Makefile for Term::ReadKey
Writing MYMETA.yml and MYMETA.json
===>  Building for p5-Term-ReadKey-2.31
cp ReadKey.pm blib/lib/Term/ReadKey.pm
AutoSplitting blib/lib/Term/ReadKey.pm (blib/lib/auto/Term/ReadKey)
/usr/local/bin/perl -I/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.16 genchars.pl

Writing termio/termios section of cchars.h... Done.
Checking for sgtty...
	Sgtty NOT found.
Writing sgtty section of cchars.h... Done.
/usr/local/bin/perl /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.16/ExtUtils/xsubpp -noprototypes -typemap /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.16/ExtUtils/typemap  ReadKey.xs > ReadKey.xsc && mv ReadKey.xsc ReadKey.c
cc -c    -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing    -DVERSION=\"2.31\"  -DXS_VERSION=\"2.31\" -DPIC -fPIC "-I/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.16/mach/CORE"   ReadKey.c
rm -f blib/arch/auto/Term/ReadKey/ReadKey.so
cc  -shared  -L/usr/local/lib -fstack-protector ReadKey.o  -o blib/arch/auto/Term/ReadKey/ReadKey.so 	    	 
chmod 755 blib/arch/auto/Term/ReadKey/ReadKey.so
/usr/local/bin/perl -MExtUtils::Command::MM -e 'cp_nonempty' -- ReadKey.bs blib/arch/auto/Term/ReadKey/ReadKey.bs 644
Manifying blib/man3/Term::ReadKey.3
# make install
===>  Staging for p5-Term-ReadKey-2.31
===>   p5-Term-ReadKey-2.31 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.16.3 - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
Files found in blib/arch: installing files in blib/lib into architecture dependent library tree
Installing /usr/ports/devel/p5-Term-ReadKey/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/mach/auto/Term/ReadKey/ReadKey.so
Installing /usr/ports/devel/p5-Term-ReadKey/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/mach/Term/ReadKey.pm
Installing /usr/ports/devel/p5-Term-ReadKey/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/mach/auto/Term/ReadKey/autosplit.ix
Installing /usr/ports/devel/p5-Term-ReadKey/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.16/man/man3/Term::ReadKey.3
====> Compressing man pages
===>  Installing for p5-Term-ReadKey-2.31
===>  Checking if devel/p5-Term-ReadKey already installed
===>   Registering installation for p5-Term-ReadKey-2.31
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/devel/p5-Term-ReadKey/work/stage/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16/mach/auto/Term/ReadKey/ReadKey.bs): No such file or directory
*** [fake-pkg] Error code 74

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/p5-Term-ReadKey.
